{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44598", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:P/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:N/SA:N/S:N/AU:Y/R:A/V:D/RE:L/U:Green"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "With valid login credentials, URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect'), Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Apache Shiro.

This issue affects Apache Shiro from 2.0-alpha to 2.1.0, and 3.0.0-alpha-1, only when using shiro-jakarta-ee integration module.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.1.1, or 3.0.0-alpha-2 or later, which fixes the issue by encrypting the cookie.

After successful login, Jakarta EE integration module uses shiroSavedRequest cookie to redirect to a particular web page after login.
This cookie was not validated, and can be forged to send a HTTP GET request from the server itself to an arbitrary URL from the cookie.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00383, "percentile": 0.30521}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wpqm-4gwx-w843", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T17:29:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpqm-4gwx-w843", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wpqm-4gwx-w843"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44598"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-25T21:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-26T13:30:50Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44598", "https://shiro.apache.org/security-reports.html#cve_2026_44598", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/25/8", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpqm-4gwx-w843"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/shiro", "summary": "Apache Shiro Vulnerable to Open Redirect, Server-Side Request Forgery", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T17:29:50Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpqm-4gwx-w843", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.shiro:shiro-jakarta-ee"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-alpha-0, < 2.2.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.0.0-alpha-2", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.shiro:shiro-jakarta-ee"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 3.0.0-alpha-1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Shiro Vulnerable to Open Redirect, Server-Side Request Forgery
